database.name: VIEW SSTPC_MOV_PROD_V
database.view: SELECT mt.m_transaction_id AS sstpc_mov_prod_v_id, mt.ad_org_id, mt.ad_client_id, mt.isactive, mt.created, mt.createdby, mt.updated, mt.updatedby, NULL AS c_bpartner_id, mi.c_costcenter_id, mp.value, mp.m_product_id, uom.c_uom_id, mt.movementqty, mw.m_warehouse_id, mt.movementtype, mi.em_ssin_documentno AS documentno, mi.movementdate, to_char('1') AS mtransaction FROM m_transaction mt LEFT JOIN m_inventoryline mil ON mil.m_inventoryline_id = mt.m_inventoryline_id AND mil.m_product_id = mt.m_product_id LEFT JOIN m_inventory mi ON mi.m_inventory_id = mil.m_inventory_id LEFT JOIN m_product mp ON mp.m_product_id = mt.m_product_id LEFT JOIN c_uom uom ON uom.c_uom_id = mp.c_uom_id LEFT JOIN m_locator ml ON ml.m_locator_id = mt.m_locator_id LEFT JOIN m_warehouse mw ON mw.m_warehouse_id = ml.m_warehouse_id WHERE mt.m_inventoryline_id IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT mt.m_transaction_id AS sstpc_mov_prod_v_id, mt.ad_org_id, mt.ad_client_id, mt.isactive, mt.created, mt.createdby, mt.updated, mt.updatedby, NULL AS c_bpartner_id, mi.c_costcenter_id, mp.value, mp.m_product_id, uom.c_uom_id, mt.movementqty, mw.m_warehouse_id, mt.movementtype, mi.documentno, mi.movementdate, to_char('2') AS mtransaction FROM m_transaction mt LEFT JOIN m_movementline mil ON mil.m_movementline_id = mt.m_movementline_id AND mil.m_product_id = mt.m_product_id LEFT JOIN m_movement mi ON mi.m_movement_id = mil.m_movement_id LEFT JOIN m_product mp ON mp.m_product_id = mt.m_product_id LEFT JOIN c_uom uom ON uom.c_uom_id = mp.c_uom_id LEFT JOIN m_locator ml ON ml.m_locator_id = mt.m_locator_id LEFT JOIN m_warehouse mw ON mw.m_warehouse_id = ml.m_warehouse_id WHERE mt.m_movementline_id IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT mt.m_transaction_id AS sstpc_mov_prod_v_id, mt.ad_org_id, mt.ad_client_id, mt.isactive, mt.created, mt.createdby, mt.updated, mt.updatedby, cbp.c_bpartner_id, COALESCE(mil.c_costcenter_id, mi.c_costcenter_id) AS c_costcenter_id, mp.value, mp.m_product_id, uom.c_uom_id, mt.movementqty, mw.m_warehouse_id, mt.movementtype, mi.documentno, mi.movementdate, to_char('3') AS mtransaction FROM m_transaction mt LEFT JOIN m_inoutline mil ON mil.m_inoutline_id = mt.m_inoutline_id AND mil.m_product_id = mt.m_product_id LEFT JOIN m_inout mi ON mi.m_inout_id = mil.m_inout_id LEFT JOIN m_product mp ON mp.m_product_id = mt.m_product_id LEFT JOIN c_uom uom ON uom.c_uom_id = mp.c_uom_id LEFT JOIN m_locator ml ON ml.m_locator_id = mt.m_locator_id LEFT JOIN m_warehouse mw ON mw.m_warehouse_id = ml.m_warehouse_id LEFT JOIN c_bpartner cbp ON cbp.c_bpartner_id = mi.c_bpartner_id WHERE mt.m_inoutline_id IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT mt.m_transaction_id AS sstpc_mov_prod_v_id, mt.ad_org_id, mt.ad_client_id, mt.isactive, mt.created, mt.createdby, mt.updated, mt.updatedby, NULL AS c_bpartner_id, mi.c_costcenter_id, mp.value, mp.m_product_id, uom.c_uom_id, mt.movementqty, mw.m_warehouse_id, mt.movementtype, mi.documentno, mi.movementdate, to_char('4') AS mtransaction FROM m_transaction mt LEFT JOIN m_productionline mil ON mil.m_productionline_id = mt.m_productionline_id AND mil.m_product_id = mt.m_product_id LEFT JOIN m_productionplan mpp ON mpp.m_productionplan_id = mil.m_productionplan_id LEFT JOIN m_production mi ON mi.m_production_id = mpp.m_production_id LEFT JOIN m_product mp ON mp.m_product_id = mt.m_product_id LEFT JOIN c_uom uom ON uom.c_uom_id = mp.c_uom_id LEFT JOIN m_locator ml ON ml.m_locator_id = mt.m_locator_id LEFT JOIN m_warehouse mw ON mw.m_warehouse_id = ml.m_warehouse_id WHERE mt.m_productionline_id IS NOT NULL
